title: Grabovica Hydroelectric Power Station
summary: The Grabovica Hydro Power Plant is one of Bosnia and Herzegovina's largest hydro power plant having an installed two electric generator capacity of 114 MW. It was commissioned 1979, and built on the Neretva River. It was opened in 1982. Facility is owned by  Government of the Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina and operated by JP Elektroprivreda BiH.
